proposal.rationale: 标题和正文中的“豆包”指代的是ByteDance的智能体产品，但VERIFIED_ALTERNATIVES中ByteDance的别名为“豆包”，而ENTITY_CANDIDATE的canonical_name为“字节豆包”，与“ByteDance”不完全匹配。此外，标题“字节豆包、阿里千问宣布拟人化智能体 7 月 10 日下线”中的“字节豆包”是“字节”和“豆包”的组合，并非VERIFIED_ALTERNATIVES中的任何一个精确名称。根据规则，canonical_name必须完全匹配VERIFIED_ALTERNATIVE，因此判定为distinct_entity。

evidence.quote: 继豆包后，阿里千问宣布拟人化互动类智能体、用户自建智能体 7 月 10 日下线

fields.value: Building a production-ready AI agent has traditionally required weeks of iteration, testing, and tuning to keep it on topic.

Agent Builder introduces a zero-prompt approach to AI agent development, compressing that process into hours and enabling organizations to rapidly build and scale a full AI workforce without sacrificing quality or control.
both business users and technical teams
Organizations need proof that an agent will follow instructions, stay on brand, and handle pressure before a real customer ever experiences it

value: ability to build a trusted AI workforce in hours instead of weeks

evidence.quote: Talkdesk®, Inc. , a leader in Customer Experience Automation (CXA)
Building a production-ready AI agent has traditionally required weeks of iteration, testing, and tuning to keep it on topic.

Agent Builder introduces a zero-prompt approach to AI agent development, compressing that process into hours and enabling organizations to rapidly build and scale a full AI workforce without sacrificing quality or control.
Talkdesk Agent Builder, a natural language-driven tool that enables both business users and technical teams to oversee the complete lifecycle of their customer service AI agents
a natural language-driven tool that enables both business users and technical teams to oversee the complete lifecycle of their customer service AI agents
Organizations need proof that an agent will follow instructions, stay on brand, and handle pressure before a real customer ever experiences it
The platform leverages customer data across enterprise systems to provide AI agents with the context needed to resolve complex requests with human-like precision.
The result is a faster path to production, lower deployment risk, and the ability to build a trusted AI workforce in hours instead of weeks.
